failures.description: The Executor fabricated the cheapest item and price instead of using the tool result. The grounded answer should have identified item 5339029584 priced at $1128.99.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user goal was to identify the cheapest available Smartphone using the ProductCatalogSearch evidence. The required tool call was made correctly, and the tool output at index 3 showed two available smartphones sorted by ascending price: item 5339029584 at $1128.99 and item 1507389580 at $1157.86. At index 4, the Executor introduced an item ID 0000000000 and price $0.01, neither of which appears in the tool output or prior context. This fabricated value was used as the final answer and was not corrected later.
